title: GK1H Recycling
description: Add-on for notblue's recycling mods made by GK1H.
body:
Add-on for notblue's recycling mods made by GK1H.

Features

Mostly just adds items to tags of those mods, but also for some changes recipes if a certain other mod is also installed, and one case adds a recipe if certain other mod is installed.

Links

CurseForge
